loop_results.name: Discovery + baseline
loop_results.notes: Completed required context read and git bootstrap; origin/main unavailable in local clone.

loop_results.name: Research + planning
loop_results.notes: Identified failing test surface in studio connection executable resolution and import-path test bootstrap gap.

loop_results.name: Implementation + validation
loop_results.notes: Patched executable resolution fallback and added tests/conftest.py. Required lint/compile/targeted tests passed.

loop_results.name: Reporting + collaboration updates
loop_results.notes: Prepared updated agent_report and structured task queue/risks with label mapping.

loop_results.name: Git sync and PR upsert
loop_results.notes: allow_write=false by contract; no branch push or draft PR creation attempted.

loop_results.name: Final loop merge decision and execution
loop_results.notes: Merge skipped because allow_write=false and no remote/gh integration in runtime.

findings: Targeted studio tests originally failed because codex executable fallback rejected unresolved PATH token in test monkeypatch context.
Pytest invocation without PYTHONPATH failed to import substrate package in this environment; repo-level conftest path bootstrapping resolved it.
gh CLI is unavailable, so GitHub issue/PR intake could not be collected from API during this run.
risks: No origin/main ref in local checkout limits ahead/behind/divergence certainty.
Fallback executable token behavior can defer missing-binary detection to subprocess execution time.
Cloud-agent route was not exercised in this local run; cloud parity remains unverified.

tasks.task: Restore origin remote tracking and branch comparison in CI runner bootstrap.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: git rev-parse origin/main succeeds and ahead/behind metrics are emitted in artifacts.

tasks.task: Add explicit test env bootstrap docs for local/uv pytest invocation.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Contributing docs include one canonical command path that passes in clean environment.

tasks.task: Create issue templates for ai-ready security-toolkit tasks with acceptance criteria/evidence paths.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: At least two templates merged and linked from ai-collaboration protocol.

test_results.command: uv run --with ruff ruff check substrate scripts tests
uv run python -m compileall substrate scripts
uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests/studio/test_connection.py tests/studio/test_api.py

assumptions: Runtime defaults applied: mode=deep, target_branch=main, allow_write=false, loop_count=6.
Because gh is missing, collaboration context relies on local git log only.
Working tree was clean at session start based on initial status output.
next_cycle_focus: Re-enable cloud_agent route and capture cloud failure telemetry when unavailable.
Expand deterministic tests around connection executable resolution edge cases.
Improve git bootstrap resilience when remotes are partially configured.
